name: Sora Mlbb
description: Sora is a free-spirited youth from the Agelta Drylands who transformed ancient legends into reality through sheer determination. Once an ordinary boy chasing the "Cloudseeker’s Song," he bonded with a fragment of the Twilight Orb to become the living embodiment of the mystical clouds. Now, he wanders the ruins of the Emerald Road, wielding fists of crackling thunder and life-giving rain to protect his desert home. Though he carries himself with a boyish, adventurous charm, he possesses the soul of a guardian, shifting between the lightness of a breeze and the fury of a storm. To Sora, no sandstorm is too fierce, for he is the hope that breathes life back into the parched earth.
creator: Zhako
